statements.__comment: Cleanup: remove stale RESOLVED_IMAGE edges on :Container from previous runs.
statements.query: MATCH (:Container)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(:Image) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE by traversing the existing HAS_IMAGE edge from Container to Image. Excludes :ImageManifestList to guarantee the target is a single-platform image.
statements.query: MATCH (c:Container)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE NOT i:ImageManifestList MERGE (c)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(i) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for containers whose HAS_IMAGE points at an ImageManifestList. Traverses CONTAINS_IMAGE to the platform child :Image whose architecture matches the container's architecture_normalized.
statements.query: MATCH (c:Container)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageManifestList)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE c.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND i._ont_architecture = c.architecture_normalized MERGE (c)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(i) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for containers whose HAS_IMAGE points at an ImageTag that points at a concrete Image.
statements.query: MATCH (c:Container)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageTag)-[:IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE NOT i:ImageManifestList MERGE (c)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(i) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for containers whose HAS_IMAGE points at an ImageTag that points at an ImageManifestList. Traverses CONTAINS_IMAGE to the architecture-matching child Image.
statements.query: MATCH (c:Container)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageTag)-[:IMAGE]->(:ImageManifestList)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE c.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND i._ont_architecture = c.architecture_normalized MERGE (c)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(i) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Cleanup: remove stale RESOLVED_IMAGE edges on :Function from previous runs.
statements.query: MATCH (:Function)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(:Image) WHERE r.lastupdated <> $UPDATE_TAG WITH r LIMIT $LIMIT_SIZE DELETE r RETURN COUNT(*) AS TotalCompleted

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for functions whose direct HAS_IMAGE points at a concrete Image.
statements.query: MATCH (f:Function)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE NOT i:ImageManifestList MERGE (f)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(i) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for functions whose direct HAS_IMAGE points at an ImageManifestList. Traverses CONTAINS_IMAGE to the architecture-matching child Image.
statements.query: MATCH (f:Function)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageManifestList)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE f.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND i._ont_architecture = f.architecture_normalized MERGE (f)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(i) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for functions whose HAS_IMAGE points at an ImageTag that points at a concrete Image.
statements.query: MATCH (f:Function)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageTag)-[:IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE NOT i:ImageManifestList MERGE (f)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(i) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG

statements.__comment: Create RESOLVED_IMAGE for functions whose HAS_IMAGE points at an ImageTag that points at an ImageManifestList. Traverses CONTAINS_IMAGE to the architecture-matching child Image.
statements.query: MATCH (f:Function)-[:HAS_IMAGE]->(:ImageTag)-[:IMAGE]->(:ImageManifestList)-[:CONTAINS_IMAGE]->(i:Image) WHERE f.architecture_normalized IS NOT NULL AND i._ont_architecture = f.architecture_normalized MERGE (f)-[r:RESOLVED_IMAGE]->(i) ON CREATE SET r.firstseen = timestamp() SET r.lastupdated = $UPDATE_TAG
